label: 场景输出
description: 把 scene 同步到渲染器：把 focus 子树展平为 voxel 图层列表（每个带 cells 的节点对应一条图层）。sink 形态——UI 上不展示输出 handle，但 NODE_OUTPUT 仍正常发射，下游通过渲染器图层桶消费。
description-en: Sync a scene to the renderer: flatten the focus subtree into a list of voxel layers (one layer per node with cells). Sink form — output handles hidden in UI, but NODE_OUTPUT still emits and the renderer's voxel-layer bucket consumes it.

inputs.name: scene
inputs.label: scene
inputs.description: 要同步到渲染器的 scene；focus 子树内每个带 cells 的节点产生一个 voxel 图层
inputs.description-en: Scene to sync to the renderer; each cell-bearing node under focus becomes one voxel layer.

outputs.name: layers
outputs.label: layers
outputs.description: voxel 图层列表（DFS 展平 focus 子树）；UI 隐藏，但通过 NODE_OUTPUT 进入渲染器 layers 桶
outputs.description-en: List of voxel layers (DFS-flattened focus subtree); UI-hidden, but flows via NODE_OUTPUT into the renderer's layers bucket.

outputs.name: names
outputs.label: names
outputs.description: 与 layers 对齐的名称清单（id/name/type；name 优先 attributes.asset_name，type 优先 attributes.asset_type）
outputs.description-en: Name list aligned with layers (id/name/type; name prefers attributes.asset_name, type prefers attributes.asset_type).
